UNCONTESTED
Off Calendar Mar-29-2022 Granted Per Written Order

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-15-2022 Continued To Mar-29-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendants Jameel Subedar, dba Tandoori Restaurant, and Sohel Subedar, dba Mela Tandooria.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:33 a.m.

Phillip G. Vermont, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 544 Golden Gate Associates LLC, a California limited liability company.
May Kwong, Property Manager for plaintif, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Vermont and Ms. Kwong appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Jameel Subedar, dba Tandoori Restaurant, or Sohel Subedar, dba Mela Tandooria.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Unlawful Detainer was filed on October 4,2019, and personally served on defendants Sohel Subedar, dba Mela Tandoori Restaurant, and Jameel Subedar, dba Mela Tandoori Restaurant, on October 17, 2019 and November 7, 2019, respectively.
DOE defendants were dismissed on November 4, 2019.
Default as to defendants Jameel Subedar, dba Tandoori Restaurant, and Sohel Subedar, dba Mela Tandooria, was entered on January 7, 2020.
Clerk's Judgment for Possession only of the premises located at 536 Golden Gate Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94102, was entered on January 7, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court issues a TENTATIVE RULING in favor of Plaintiff Golden Gate Associates LLC, a California limited liability company, and against the defaulted defendants Jameel Subedar, dba Tandoori Restaurant, and Sohel Subedar, dba Mela Tandooria, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $76,475.00.
Holdover Damages - $251,051.85.
Attorney Fees - To Be Determined.
Costs - $1,641.05.
CAMs* - $29,426.66.
Minus Credit - ($78,345.00)

Sub-Total - $280,249.56.

Additionally, plaintiff is entited to possession of the property located at 536 Golden Gate Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94102.

Matter is CONTINUED to March 29, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. for further default prove-up on the sole issue of plaintiff's request for attorney fees. To date, plaintiff has not presented any documentation in support of the $8,103.00 requested in fees. The Court has accepted the testimony of the witness, May Kwong, and her appearance is waived at the next calling of the case.

Proceedings concluded at 10:52 a.m.

*Common Area Mantenance Charges.
